script: for i in $(seq 1 90); do if [ -f scripts/workflow-builder/materialize-consumer-radar.mjs ]; then echo builder-files-ready; exit 0; fi; sleep 2; done; echo 'missing builder support files' >&2; exit 1
command:
exec 2>&1
for i in $(seq 1 90); do if [ -f scripts/workflow-builder/materialize-consumer-radar.mjs ]; then echo builder-files-ready; exit 0; fi; sleep 2; done; echo 'missing builder support files' >&2; exit 1
